item.title: Hi there! ✨
item.description:
Hello dear readers 🌸

Welcome to my little corner of the universe.

I am Granny, and I have always believed that the sky has stories to tell. The stars, the moon, and the planets are not just far away lights — they are like old friends guiding us gently through life.

In this space, I will share simple thoughts about astrology, daily inspirations, and little bits of wisdom I have gathered over the years. Nothing complicated — just calm, meaningful reflections that anyone can enjoy.
